news.t: YieldMax® ETFs Announces Distributions on BIGY, RNTY and SOXY
YieldMax® ETFs Announces Distributions on BIGY, RNTY and SOXY
YieldMax™ Launches the Target 12™ Real Estate Option Income ETF (RNTY)

holdings.infoBox: RNTY is an equity ETF with a total of 76 individual holdings. The top holdings are Prologis stock at 6.92%, Welltower at 6.60%, Digital Realty Trust at 5.70%, Simon Property Group at 5.23%, and Equinix at 4.82%.

overview.description: The YieldMax Target 12 Real Estate Option Income ETF (RNTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that targets an annual income level of 12% by investing in US-listed real estate companies while employing a covered call strategy. RNTY was launched on Apr 16, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
